news.t: BlackRock offers retirement-date ETFs for investors saving outside 401(k) plans

overview.description: The iShares LifePath Retirement ETF (IRTR) is an exchange-traded fund that mostly invests in target outcome asset allocation. The fund is a fund-of-funds that seeks to provide a conservative, broad asset allocation through an actively managed portfolio of equity, fixed income, and money market ETFs. The fund is designed for investors looking to retire or begin withdrawing assets in the near future. IRTR was launched on Oct 17, 2023 and is issued by BlackRock.

data.title: BlackRock offers retirement-date ETFs for investors saving outside 401(k) plans
data.text: BlackRock is offering target-date exchanged-traded funds aimed at helping people save for their retirement outside of a 401 (K) plan.
